1.acrostic: SHOW, GABRIEL TELLS ZECHARIAH, THEN TELLS MARY, VISITOR, MARY PRAISES, JOHN'S BIRTH, ZECHARIAH'S SONG

2.acrostic: YOUR SON, ANGEL ANNOUNCES, TWO PROPHETS PRAISE, HE, AMAZES RABBIS

3.acrostic: SHOWING THE WAY TO JESUS, BAPTISM AND ANCESTRY

4.acrostic: TEMPTING JESUS, HE, READS FROM SCROLL, REBUKES, HEAL, OUT

5.acrostic: ENLIST PETER, CLEAN, MAT MAN WALK, MATT UP, NEW WINE

6.acrostic: MY DAY, WITHER, CHOSE, BLESSED, WOE, DO TO OTHERS, JUDGED, FIG, ROCK

7.acrostic: A CENTURION, SON RISE, TELL JOHN THE BAPTIST, WASHED WITH TEARS

8.acrostic: THE SOWER PARABLE, LIT, FAM, CALM, HUGE HERD OF PIGS, TWO DAUGHTERS SAVED

9.acrostic: INTO TOWNS, FIVE K MEN, WHO, YET LOSE, WHITE ROBE, SON FREE, WELCOME, REBUKE, FOLLOW

10.acrostic: CHOSE SEVENTY-TWO TO SEND OUT, GOOD SAMARITAN, UPSET

11.acrostic: ASK AND RECEIVE, A KINGDOM DIVIDED, SIGN, EYES, WOES TO THE PHARISEES

12.acrostic: CONFESS ME NOW, A RICH FOOL, DO NOT BE AFRAID, MUST BE READY NOW, FIRE ON EARTH

13.acrostic: CUT IT DOWN, CURED HER, SEED, ENTER DOOR, KILLS

14.acrostic: ON A DAY, SIT LOWLY, GUESTS COME, HATE AND SALT

15.acrostic: UNTIL HE, TEN, THE PRODIGAL SON RETURNED

16.acrostic: NOTE THE SHREWD, VALUE, NO DROP OF WATER

17.acrostic: TURNS, THANKS, TEN HEALED, DAYS OF THE SON OF MAN

18.acrostic: ONE WIDOW, ONE MAN, OWN, ONE THING LACKS, ONTO, OPEN SIGHT

19.acrostic: FOR THE LOST, FRUITFUL SERVANT IS, FROM THIS MOUNT, FLAT, FOES

20.acrostic: JOHN'S BAPTISM AND HEIR, JUST TAX, JUST LIKE ANGELS, JESUS IS

21.acrostic: EACH, ENDURE TO BE SAVED, ERECT HEAD, EARTH, EARLY

22.acrostic: SATAN IN THE MAN, SHARE A MEAL, SERVANT, SIFT LIKE, SLEEPING, SHADOWS, SAID I AM NOT, SAY IF GOD

23.acrostic: UPSET, USELESS, UNJUST VERDICT, UPON A CROSS TO SAVE US, UNVEIL, USE TOMB

24.acrostic: SAW THE LINENS, SEE A STRANGER BREAKS BREAD, SEE MY HANDS REAL, STAY
